name: Falafel (Am)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients, except baking soda, together in a food processor or blender.
2. Process thoroughly until the mixture is smooth and well combined.
3. Form the mixture into small patties, about 1-1/2 inches in diameter and 1/2 inch thick.
4. When ready to fry, add baking soda to the patties.
5. Fry the patties in hot oil until they are lightly browned and crisp.
6. Serve hot with tomatoes in pita bread. Add cucumber pickles if desired.
